summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Partners page improvements for SAMIDEL textile management system. Both backend API and frontend UI are working excellently with all requested features implemented correctly.
passed_tests: Partners API - GET /api/partners/ returns partner list with capacity data
Partners API - POST /api/partners/ creates confection partner with correct capacity calculation (10 workers × 8h × 100% eff × 50% occup = 880h/month)
Partners API - POST /api/partners/ creates laundry partner with simplified profile (processing time, daily capacity, delivery time)
Partners API - POST /api/partners/ creates finishing partner with simplified profile
Partners API - PUT /api/partners/{id} updates occupancy rate and recalculates capacity correctly (50% → 75% = 880h → 1188h)
Partners API - GET /api/partners/{id} retrieves individual partner data
Partners API - DELETE /api/partners/{id} removes partners with correct status codes
Partners UI - Navigation to Partners page via Configurações > Parceiros menu
Partners UI - Partners table displays with Capacity and Available columns
Partners UI - Create confection partner form shows complete profile fields (workers, efficiency, occupancy rate, quality)
Partners UI - Capacity calculation display shows real-time calculation (10 trab × 8h × 100% eff × 50% occup = 40h/day, 880h/month)
Partners UI - Create laundry partner form shows simplified profile fields (processing time, daily capacity, delivery time)
Partners UI - Create finishing partner form shows simplified profile fields
Partners UI - Partner type badges show different colors (blue for Confecção, amber for Lavandaria/Acabamento)
Partners UI - Partners table shows appropriate data per type (confection shows capacity in hours, simplified shows pieces/day or delivery time)
Partners UI - Partner editing functionality loads existing data correctly
